chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 307 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Fresh case 1. For orders on office objection at flag „A‟ 2. For orders on CMA No.1274/2024 (Ex.A) 3. For hearing of main case 18-09-2025 On 11-09-2025 the following order was passed;- “None present for the Petitioner nor any intimation received. From perusal of prayer clause, it reflects that Petitioner is seeking compensation of land donated for construction of School Building. This Petition is liable to be dismissed for non-prosecution; however, in the interest of justice, matter is adjourned to 18-09-2025. Let intimation notice be issued to the Counsel for the Petitioner.” Though intimation notice issued to the Counsel for the Petitioner for today, even then none has affected appearance on behalf of the Petitioner. The instant Petition is pending without any useful progress. The conduct of the Petitioner and his Counsel prima facie suggests either the purpose of filing instant Petition has been served or they have lost interest in pursuing this Petition. Accordingly, the same is dismissed for non-prosecution along with listed application. Judge Judge ARBROHI/PS
